description_long: This is a classic shovel featuring a straight, dark wooden handle with a T-shaped grip at the top, providing a secure hold for the user. The blade is a broad, rounded-point design made of dark metal, ideal for digging and scooping. The transition between the handle and the blade is reinforced, suggesting durability and strength. The wood grain is visible along the handle, and the metal blade has a slightly matte, weathered finish. No visible brand markings or decorative elements are present. The overall construction appears robust and practical for urban gardening, landscaping, or maintenance tasks.
description: A sturdy shovel with a dark wooden T-grip handle and a broad, rounded metal blade, showing a practical and robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the straight wooden handle and the slight curvature of the metal blade.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the T-shaped grip and the full width of the rounded-point metal blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the handle's straight profile and the blade's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the T-grip and the smooth, slightly convex back of the blade.
attribute_handle_type: T-grip handle, straight, made of dark wood with visible grain
attribute_blade_type: Rounded-point blade, broad and slightly curved, made of dark metal
